preamble: The transformation of the voiced velar plosive /g/ into the voiceless uvular fricative /χ/ is a documented lenition process involving devoicing and a shift in place of articulation.

examples.note: In the Itzgründisch variety, Middle High German /g/ in words like 'Berg' undergoes spirantization to [χ], as seen in [barχ] for 'Berg'.
